title: Tangy Crumbly Butter Crumble
description: A cozy Ukrainian dish featuring melted butter baked into a tangy crumbly topping, perfect for breakfast or dessert.

ingredients.name: sugar
ingredients.notes: packed brown sugar for a richer flavor

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine softened butter and sugar until well blended.
Add lemon juice and vanilla extract; mix until smooth.
Gradually stir in flour and salt while continuing to mix until the mixture forms a thick paste.
Spoon the crumble mixture evenly over a lightly greased baking dish (if using).
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
